programs.title: ITV Evening News
programs.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programs.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programs.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as one Chaser is all that stands between Karim Zeroual, Christopher Biggins, Ellie Leach, Des Clarke and thousands of pounds for their chosen charities.

programs.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
programs.desc: Josie and the gang help Tim box up and value his girlfriend Sally's lifetime of collections behind her back. Can she part with her possessions and take the cash.

programs.title: Emmerdale
programs.desc: Marlon encourages April to be brave. Zara suggests putting Bear on the stand.

programs.title: Coronation Street
programs.desc: Kit begins an investigation into the tragedy, Debbie waits for news, Shona wants answers, Todd remains in limbo, and the truth about Megan causes ructions for the Driscolls.

programs.title: Secret Service
programs.desc: The pressure mounts on Kate when the Russians target her family, and Rav follows the trail of Ryan Walker's finances to Geneva with drastic consequences.
